mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 5.0%, labor market tightness accelerates wage growth and consumer spending, boosting corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day forward returns in more than 60% of instances where UNRATE drops below 5.0.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production combined with declining housing starts signals a rotation from cyclical to defensive demand, compressing equity risk premiums and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term (INDPRO up, HOUST down) fails to predict positive 60-day forward returns in more than 50% of observed instances.

mechanism_narrative: In a rising rate environment, real GDP growth exceeding 2.5% annualized sustains corporate profit margins, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days despite higher discount rates.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are negative or flat when FEDFUNDS rises and GDPC1 exceeds 2.5% annualized in more than 40% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls signals robust aggregate demand, supporting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for PAYEMS month-over-month changes remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the CPI index rises above 2.2% year-over-year, inflation expectations become embedded in pricing, prompting the Federal Reserve to tighten policy, which compresses equity multiples and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in more than 60% of instances where CPI YoY exceeds 2.2%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and declines in the unemployment rate indicate accelerating consumer spending power, which lifts earnings expectations and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising RSAFS and falling UNRATE fails to predict positive 60-day forward returns in more than 50% of observed instances.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of constrained housing construction, rising industrial output reflects supply chain bottlenecks that temporarily boost corporate pricing power, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are negative when HOUST drops below 1.0M and INDPRO rises in more than 45% of cases.
